description: Comprehensive evidence summary table comparing UBAC2 to active rhomboid proteases across all critical features
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(16, 10))
ax.axis('off')
ax.set_xlim(0, 1)
ax.set_ylim(0, 1)

# Title
ax.text(0.5, 0.97, 'UBAC2 (Q8NBM4): Serine-Type Endopeptidase Activity (GO:0004252)',
        ha='center', va='top', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax.text(0.5, 0.935, 'Verdict: REFUTED — Over-annotated rhomboid pseudoprotease',
        ha='center', va='top', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', color='#C62828',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.4', facecolor='#FFCDD2', edgecolor='#C62828'))

# Evidence table
table_data = [
    ['Evidence Line', 'Active Rhomboid\n(e.g. RHBDL2)', 'UBAC2', 'Result'],
    ['GxSG catalytic Ser\n(required in TM4)', 'GASG at pos 185\nin TM4', 'GSSG only at pos 6\n(N-terminal, NOT in TM)', 'ABSENT'],
    ['Catalytic His\n(required in TM6)', 'His250 in TM6\n(annotated active site)', 'All His in lumenal\nor cytoplasmic regions', 'ABSENT'],
    ['TM segment count\n(6-7 required)', '7 TM helices\n(complete fold)', '3 TM helices\n(truncated fold)', 'INSUFFICIENT'],
    ['TM4-TM7 region\n(catalytic core)', 'Present: contains\nboth catalytic residues', 'Missing: replaced by\ncytoplasmic tail + UBA', 'MISSING'],
    ['Biochemical protease\nassay evidence', 'Substrate cleavage\ndemonstrated', 'Never tested; no\nsubstrate cleavage', 'NO EVIDENCE'],
    ['Literature\nclassification', 'Active serine\nprotease', '"Rhomboid\npseudoprotease"', 'PSEUDOPROTEASE'],
    ['InterPro/Pfam\nclassification', 'IPR022764:\nRhomboid protease', 'IPR061914:\nInactive rhomboid', 'INACTIVE'],
]

# Draw the table
row_height = 0.085
col_widths = [0.22, 0.24, 0.24, 0.18]
x_starts = [0.06, 0.28, 0.52, 0.76]
y_start = 0.87

for i, row in enumerate(table_data):
    y = y_start - i * row_height
    
    for j, (cell, width, x) in enumerate(zip(row, col_widths, x_starts)):
        if i == 0:  # Header
            color = '#263238'
            text_color = 'white'
            fontweight = 'bold'
            fontsize = 9
        elif j == 1:  # Active rhomboid column
            color = '#E8F5E9'
            text_color = '#1B5E20'
            fontweight = 'normal'
            fontsize = 8
        elif j == 2:  # UBAC2 column
            color = '#FFEBEE'
            text_color = '#B71C1C'
            fontweight = 'normal'
            fontsize = 8
        elif j == 3:  # Result column
            color = '#FFCDD2'
            text_color = '#C62828'
            fontweight = 'bold'
            fontsize = 9
        else:  # Feature column
            color = '#ECEFF1'
            text_color = '#263238'
            fontweight = 'bold'
            fontsize = 8
        
        rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((x, y - row_height + 0.01), width - 0.01, row_height - 0.005,
                                        boxstyle="round,pad=0.003", facecolor=color, edgecolor='#B0BEC5')
        ax.add_patch(rect)
        ax.text(x + width/2 - 0.005, y - row_height/2 + 0.008, cell,
               ha='center', va='center', fontsize=fontsize, fontweight=fontweight,
               color=text_color, linespacing=1.3)

# Bottom section: Key conclusions
y_bottom = 0.17
ax.text(0.06, y_bottom, 'Key Conclusions:', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', va='top')

conclusions = [
    '1. UBAC2 belongs to the rhomboid-like superfamily but is a catalytically INACTIVE pseudoprotease.',
    '2. The GO:0004252 (serine-type endopeptidase activity) IBA annotation is from PANTHER phylogenetic',
    '   propagation (GO_REF:0000033) — not experimental evidence.',
    '3. PMID:23297223 (the reference in the GO annotation) itself calls UBAC2 a "rhomboid pseudoprotease".',
    '4. UBAC2 actual functions: ER-phagy receptor (PMID:39284914), ubiquitin binding (UBA domain),',
    '   and ER membrane protein trafficking regulation.',
    '5. Curation recommendation: REMOVE GO:0004252; consider NOT annotation to prevent re-propagation.'
]
for i, line in enumerate(conclusions):
    ax.text(0.06, y_bottom - 0.025 - i*0.018, line, fontsize=8, va='top',
           color='#212121', family='monospace')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('ubac2_evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Evidence summary figure saved.")
